Bash(c:/wamp64/bin/php/php7.4.33/php.exe -r 'try { $pdo = new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=localhost;dbname=fayxzvov_alpha'\\'', '\\''root'\\'', '\\'''\\''\); echo '\\''== sucursales coffee tiene asignadas =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT s.id, s.name, s.companies_id, s.active FROM usr_user_subsidiaries us JOIN subsidiaries s ON s.id = us.subsidiaries_id WHERE us.usr_users_id = ?"\); $st->execute\([53]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); echo PHP_EOL.'\\''== sucursales companies_id de coffee \(id 25\) =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT id, name, companies_id FROM subsidiaries WHERE id = ?"\); $st->execute\([25]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); echo PHP_EOL.'\\''== todas sucursales de la misma compania =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT s2.id, s2.name FROM subsidiaries s1 JOIN subsidiaries s2 ON s2.companies_id = s1.companies_id WHERE s1.id = ?"\); $st->execute\([25]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); } catch \(Exception $e\) { echo '\\''ERR: '\\''.$e->getMessage\(\); }')

Bash(c:/wamp64/bin/php/php7.4.33/php.exe -r 'try { $pdo = new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=localhost;dbname=fayxzvov_alpha'\\'', '\\''root'\\'', '\\'''\\''\); echo '\\''== prueba: sucursales que coffee deberia ver \(id 53\) =='\\''.PHP_EOL; $st = $pdo->prepare\("SELECT subsidiaries.id, subsidiaries.name, subsidiaries.active FROM usr_user_subsidiaries INNER JOIN subsidiaries ON subsidiaries.id = usr_user_subsidiaries.subsidiaries_id WHERE usr_user_subsidiaries.usr_users_id = ? AND subsidiaries.enabled = 1 ORDER BY subsidiaries.active DESC, subsidiaries.name ASC"\); $st->execute\([53]\); print_r\($st->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\)\); } catch \(Exception $e\) { echo '\\''ERR: '\\''.$e->getMessage\(\); }')
